# Althea Resorts

> Althea Resorts is a 5-star luxury boutique hotel in Ano Loutro, Xylokastro, Corinthia, Greece — 60 minutes from Athens. The property features 41 rooms and suites with Corinthian Gulf views, the Ocean Spa by Oceanis, and rooftop restaurant AITHER. Direct bookings: https://althearesort.reserve-online.net

## Rooms & Suites

- [Standard Double](https://althearesorts.com/accommodation/standard-double)
- [Deluxe Double](https://althearesorts.com/accommodation/deluxe-double-mv-pv)
- [Deluxe Double with Sharing Pool](https://althearesorts.com/accommodation/deluxe-double-private-pool)
- [Superior Sea View](https://althearesorts.com/accommodation/superior-sea-view)
- [Junior Suite with Private Pool](https://althearesorts.com/accommodation/junior-suite-private-pool)
- [Althea Loft Suite Outdoor Jacuzzi](https://althearesorts.com/accommodation/althea-loft-suite)

## Experiences & Facilities

- [Experiences](https://althearesorts.com/experiences): Swimming pool, spa, weddings, conferences, outdoor activities
- [Ocean Spa](https://althearesorts.com/spa): Oceanis wellness treatments, hammam, 3 treatment cabins
- [Gastronomy](https://althearesorts.com/gastronomy): AITHER rooftop restaurant, Lobby Bar, Pool Bar, Beach Bar, Main Restaurant

## Information

- [About Althea Resorts](https://althearesorts.com/about)
- [Location](https://althearesorts.com/location): Ano Loutro, Xylokastro, Corinthia — 60 min from Athens, near Ancient Corinth and the Corinthian Gulf
- [Photo Gallery](https://althearesorts.com/gallery)
- [Special Offers](https://althearesorts.com/offers): 10% direct booking discount
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://althearesorts.com/faq)
- [Journal](https://althearesorts.com/journal)
- [Contact](https://althearesorts.com/contact): Tel +30 27430 24063 · reservations@althearesorts.com · Ano Loutro, Xylokastro 20400, Corinthia, Greece
